inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $312,832k / 203,618,559 weighted average shares (2025 Annual Report MD&A)
inputs.normalization_note: Royalty/stream model: owner cash approximates operating cash flow; minimal sustaining capex. FY2025 OCF equals free cash flow per company non-IFRS table. 2026 GEO guidance 95k-105k is below FY2025 actual 113,237 GEOs; base growth assumes commodity price normalization offset by portfolio additions (Orogen).

optionality_gate.notes: Credit Facility $700M undrawn at Dec 31, 2025; accordion to $1B. No term debt. Dividend $0.23/sh is not a dhando floor.

bear.notes: Gold/silver mean-revert; 2026 GEO guidance 95-105k below FY2025 113k; Northparkes step-down risk; multiple compresses

base.notes: Mid-single-digit cash flow growth [Assumption] off FY2025 record; 2030 management outlook 140-150k GEOs not in base Lawrence path

bull.notes: Commodity prices hold; Orogen assets ramp; Evolution Northparkes expansion; development book converts

segments.label: Producing precious metal streams & royalties
segments.evidence: 34 producing assets; FY2025 113,237 GEOs; Northparkes, Cerro Lindo, Buritica top revenue contributors per AIF

segments.label: Other metals & diversified royalties
segments.evidence: Silver and base-metal royalties; 24% FY2025 revenue from silver per annual report commentary

options.label: Development & exploration royalty book (205 assets)
options.base_terminal_rationale: No audited fair values for pre-production portfolio; 205 development/exploration assets not in FY2026 GEO guidance
options.evidence: 2025 Annual Report: 205 development & exploration assets vs 34 producing; 2030 GEO outlook 140-150k is management aspiration only

options.label: Northparkes expansion / Evolution funding option
options.base_terminal_rationale: TF International agreed to fund $84.3M in Q4 2026 for Northparkes development; incremental GEOs above 2026 guidance band — P-weighted overlay only
options.evidence: investor-documents/sec-edgar/2025-Form-40-F.pdf AIF — Evolution / TF International funding announcement Feb 2026

options.label: Orogen transaction assets (closed July 2025)
options.base_terminal_rationale: C$171.5M cash + 5.6M shares issued; cash flows embedded in producing segment growth [Assumption]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Shareholders equity $2.05B vs economic royalty/stream portfolio; intangibles carry contractual cash flows not fully marked to spot commodity prices

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 205 development/exploration assets; management 2030 outlook 140-150k GEOs vs 113k FY2025

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: No operating mines; corporate G&A modest vs revenue

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Streams and royalties recognized as operators produce

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 11% Orogen Spinco stake; prepaid gold interests per balance sheet

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Regular quarterly dividend program since 2021; no litigation recovery in base year

option_scan.question: Embedded option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Record precious metal prices in FY2025 revenue $389M (+44% YoY); commodity beta in producing segment

catalyst_paths.event: Northparkes expansion funding and incremental GEOs
catalyst_paths.impact: GEO growth above 2026 guidance band of 95-105k
Flat to declining cash flow; multiple compression
Portfolio growth via $700M undrawn credit facility

growth_explanation.mechanism: GEO volume from 34 producing assets times precious metal prices, plus new stream investments (Orogen, Sierra Sun, Allied streams). 2026 guidance 95-105k GEOs below FY2025 113k actual.
growth_explanation.source: 2025 Annual Report MD&A and 2026 guidance table

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

nav_overlay.notes: Do not use GAAP book as dhando floor

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
